sourceOverview.notes: Granite LLMs. TTS: Watson TTS, multiple languages. STT: Watson Speech, enterprise-grade.

activeModelsSummary.llm:
Granite 4.0 family [granite-4.0] — watsonx.ai model family
Granite 3.x family [granite-3.x] — Still available in many deployments
activeModelsSummary.tts:
Watson Text to Speech [watson-tts]

audit.priceRangeSummary: Lite tiers include ~500 STT minutes/month and ~10k TTS chars/month; paid pricing varies by plan/region/service generation.
audit.limitsSummary: TTS language/voice availability differs by voice family. STT model choice varies by language. IBM has begun partnering with Deepgram but native services still exist.
audit.regionSummary: IBM Cloud regions vary by service instance; exact model-level data center is not always public.
audit.ttsLanguagesSummary: English AU/US expressive voices; enhanced neural voices in Dutch, English UK/US, French CA/FR, German, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese BR, Spanish variants.
audit.sttLanguagesSummary: Large speech models in English, Japanese, French; broader coverage via older and next-gen models.
audit.freeTierSummary: Yes: Lite tiers for both STT and TTS.
audit.appIntegrationNotes: Enterprise-friendly, but speech product line is more service-oriented than single model-ID oriented.

supplementalResearch.title: 13. IBM watsonx (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓
supplementalResearch.markdown:
### 13. IBM watsonx (US) — LLM ✓ TTS ✓ STT ✓

**Status:** Active.

**watsonx.ai LLMs:** `granite-4-h-small` ($0.06 in/$0.25 out), plus Granite 3.x models and third-party (Llama, Mistral, OpenAI GPT-OSS). Free tier: **300,000 tokens/month**. ⚠️ API is **NOT OpenAI-compatible** — uses IBM's proprietary format.

**Watson TTS:** 35 neural voices, 16 languages. Free (Lite): 10,000 chars/month. Standard: ~$0.02/1K chars. ⚠️ Lite tier auto-deletes after 30 days of inactivity.

**Watson STT:** Free (Lite): 500 min/month (auto-deletes after 30 days inactivity). Plus: $0.02/min. 11+ languages. Real-time streaming + batch.

Datacenters: Dallas, Frankfurt, London, Tokyo, Sydney, Washington DC.

---
